title: Rainbow Eco Play - Magic Elasti Sand - Purple - 485g - Magic Kids Coloured Sand - Non-Toxic - Colour Sand - Sensory Toys for Autism - Stocking Filler - ASMR Toys
features: MAGIC ELASTI SAND - Super light and wonderfully tactile, Magic Elasti Sand is an unbelievably soft sensory toy made of 100% natural minerals. You quite literally have to feel it to believe it…think SLIME WITHOUT THE GOO! It's made of sand so it's dry, but it moves and flows just like slime

PERFECT FOR - Magic Elasti Sand is a great sensory toy for both adults and children alike – working with the moving sand can help reduce stress and produce a calming effect. It’s a great activity which can be used all year round, keeping children entertained for hours – they will never want to put it down. Cleaning up Elasti Sand dry slime is easy

SIZE & COLOUR OPTIONS - Rainbow Eco Play's Magic Elasti Sand arrives in handy resealable pouches. Magic Elasti Sand is also available in a variety of different colours: Blue, Green, Pink, Purple, Red & Yellow. Why not get creative and use multiple colours to create extra colourful moulds

ALSO AVAILABLE - We design and manufacture a colourful range of creative sand products for children including Play Sand, Sand Shakers, Craft Sand, Smooshy Sand and more! There’s plenty to choose from so you can find what suits you best. The possibilities for open-ended play are limitless with our super-fun, super-safe play sand

RAINBOW ECO PLAY - At Rainbow Eco Play, we pride ourselves on manufacturing play sand to the highest level – with quality and safety at the heart of what we do. However please note Magic Elasti Sand might not perform as well when cold and compressed. Work it with warm hands to make it stretchy
